content_body: My husband and I came here to celebrate our 35th wedding anniversary. We enjoyed our stay very much! The view is amazing. So relaxing to get away to the mountains and this cozy cabin. We were here for nine days and went into Blue Ridge, hiked and played miniture golf.  We had fun! Can't wait to come back when it is cold. Time to go back to reality now but we will be back to the mountains again!
title: 35th Anniversary Spent in the North GA Mountains
